rules: Append-only, git-timestamped public track record. Each call carries the model probability AT TIME OF CALL and explicit criteria checkable from this repo's committed exports. NEVER edit or delete a resolved call; a correction is a NEW call. Auto-graded by analysis/calls.py in every nightly run; Brier reported over resolved calls. A quarter grades only once it is full-coverage in the exports.

criteria_types.us_equip_lte: US-origin HS 8486 exports to China in {quarter} <= {threshold_bn} USD bn (did_counterfactual.us_actual_usd)
criteria_types.domestic_yoy_up: domestic semicap revenue in {quarter} > same quarter prior year

calls.claim: Full-coverage domestic WFE share is >= 20% in 2026Q2
calls.comparison: Base case: substitution grind continues from 22.0% (2025Q4); measured level is a lower bound (HS8486 flat-panel contamination).

calls.claim: Full-coverage domestic WFE share reaches >= 24% by 2026Q4
calls.comparison: ~+2pp/yr structural drift would land here; coin-flip on the pace. Bernstein's path implies faster (~24-25%).

calls.claim: US-origin equipment exports to China stay <= $0.5bn in 2026Q4 (channel exhausted by controls)
calls.comparison: US already ~$0.4bn/qtr and falling; near-total controls. Tests the 'diminishing US lever' thesis.

calls.claim: Frontier-chip domestic share (proxy) stays <= 15% in 2026Q4 (chips lag tools)
calls.comparison: AI-demand pull keeps chip imports rising faster than domestic logic output; the two-layer divergence persists.

calls.claim: Domestic semicap revenue (6 listed makers) grows YoY in 2026Q2 vs 2025Q2
calls.comparison: High conviction: substitution momentum + Big Fund III (Yen344bn). The autonomous-substitution engine.
